headline: Adobe to Announce Q2 FY2026 Earnings Results on June 11, 2026

headline: Michael Burry Sees Adobe As AI Fat Pitch With Valuation Upside
summary: Renowned investor Michael Burry has recently highlighted Adobe (NasdaqGS:ADBE) as a "fat pitch" opportunity. Burry's view centers on Adobe's AI roadmap, particularly its Firefly tools, during a period of concern about AI commoditization across software. He has compared Adobe's competitive position and enterprise adoption to leading cybersecurity and software peers, offering a fresh angle on the stock. Adobe's share price sits at $259.21, with the stock down 22.2% year to date and down 35.7%...
